results.instruction:
There is a batch file renaming script at /app/src/rename.py that renames files in /app/data/files/ to add a date prefix in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Run it with: run-code rename.py
The script has bugs — some files may end up in the wrong place or not be renamed correctly.
If the data files get corrupted or moved, run: restore-data
You cannot read the source code directly (it's permission-restricted).
Ask your collaborator for help diagnosing and fixing the bugs.
Apply fixes using: cat fixed.py | apply-fix rename.py
After fixing, run the script again to verify all files are correctly renamed in /app/data/files/.
